name: Mathematics
direction: This is a test of your ability to think out solutions to quantitative problems in mathematics. Analyze and solve each problem carefully. Determine the four choices a, b, c, d.

questions.text: If 23 + 28 + 37 + x + 53 = 168 and 23 + 28 + 40 + y + 50 = 120. Find the value of x - y
Find the product: 800 &#215 125.
Find the quotient: 8000 &#247 125.
What is the remainder when 192,888 is divided by 8?
Rounding 299,943 to the nearest thousands the result is
398.101 is read as
options: three hundred ninety eight, one hundred one
three hundred ninety eight and one hundred on
three hundred ninety eight and one hundred one hundredths
three hundred ninety eight and one hundred one thousandths
questions.answer: three hundred ninety eight and one hundred one thousandths

questions.text: A number is divisible by 8 if its last three digits is divisible by 8. Which of the following numbers is divisible by 8?
Which of the following statements is true?
options: If a number is divisible by 5, then it is divisible by 10
If a number is divisible by 10, then it is divisible by 5
If a number is divisible by 3, then it is divisible by 6
If a number is divisible by 4, then it is divisible by 8
questions.answer: If a number is divisible by 10, then it is divisible by 5

questions.text: Simplify : 12 (128 - 84)  +  (128 - 84)  -  12 (128 - 24)
Simplify : 3313% of 48   +   1212% of 96   -   4449% of 27
Reduce 2311000 to its lowest terms.
Which of the following is true?
Find the value of x  :   x = [ 38 (72) + 57 (35) ]
What is 25% of 228?
228 is 25% of what number?
168 is what percent of 672?
Evaluate: 123 &times 0.1 + 123 × 0.01 + 123 × 0.0001.
Find 314 of 16.
Evaluate: 1 + 12 + 14 + 18
Find the value of x  in the equation 3x + 7 = 28.
Which of the following has the greatest value?
Which of the following cannot  yield an odd integer when divided by 10?
options: The sum of two odd integers.

The product of a prime number and an
odd integer.
The product of two odd integers
The sum of three consecutive integers
questions.answer: The product of two odd integers

questions.text: If 8x + 12 = 24, what is the value of 24x + 36?
If a positive integer m is divisible by both 3 and 8, then m must also be divisible by
If positive integers m and n are not both odd, which of the following is always true?
Find the average temperature change for the 12-day perioD.  Temperature change in degree celsius : 2.6, 3.8, 7.0, 4.5, 4.6, 7.9, 5.0, 8.1, 4.4, 5.3, 6.4, 5.2
Find the set of all odd numbers x satisfying the conditions 5x - 4 ≤ 0 and 3x - 7 ≥ 0.
State the property illustrated.  If 8(6) + 4 = 48 + 4 and 48 + 4 = 52 then 8(6) + 4 = 52
If 8 less than the product of a number and -3 is greater than 7, which of the following could be that number?
The difference between 8 times a number and 17 is 231. Find the number.
Four times the perimeter of a parking lot is 16 less than 2,000 meters. What is the perimeter of the lot?
The amount of last month's telephone bill, decreased by the product of 3 and ₱30.00 equals ₱1,319.50.
Eighteen less than seven times the number of sandwiches is 269. How many sandwiches are there?
A house and lot are sold for ₱ 14M. The house costs 1.5 times as much as the lot. How much does the lot cost?
The sale price of a television set is ₱ 7,200. The discount rate is 40%. Find its regular price.
The lengths of the sides of a triangle can be represented by three consecutive integers. The perimeter of the triangle is 96 cm. Find the length of the longest side of the triangle.
The lengths of the rectangle is 8 meters more than twice its width. The perimeter is 112 meters. Find its areA.
Paula is twice as old as Queenie. Seven years ago the sum of their ages was 16. How old is Queenie now?
For what value of x will x be the average of 2, 4x, 6, 8, 10 ?
How many integers between 197 and 303 are divisible by 4 or 10 ?
A patient must take his medication every 7 hours starting at 7:00 AM Sunday. On what day will the patient first receive his medication at 8 AM ?
Of the 300 grocery surveyed, 96 did not have a regular day of the week which they shop. What percentage of the shoppers did not have a regular day of shopping?
A water container has 100ml of water in it and is 20% full. How many ml of water can this container hold if it is full?
How many containers each occupies an area of 218 square meters can be stored in a 952-square meter warehouse?

A starting salary of a secretary at ABC computer Specialists is ₱15,000 a month. Next year the starting salary will be raised to ₱18,000 a month. What will is the rate of increase in the starting salary?

The cost of a square meter commercial lot in a certain municipality five years ago was ₱12,500. There was a 420% increase in the price in the last five years. What is the price per square meter of that lot today?

Last month a store manager decided to decrease the prices of all items by 10%. This month he increased the prices by 10%. What would be the price for a pair of pants that had cost ₱750 before prices were decreased last month?

When the original price of an item is increased by a certain rate, the increased price is ₱3,100. When the original price is decreased by the same rate, the decreased price is ₱1,900. What is the original price of this item?
How much must one has to invest in corporate bonds paying 9.6% in order to earn an income of ₱12,000 per annum?
How much must be cut from the edge of a piece of glass 1618cm wide, in order for it to fit into an opening 1434cm wide?
A race car traveled for 212 hours with an average speed of 13258 km per hour. Find the total distance covereD.
If the weight of a 241-kg freight car increases 318 times when fully loaded. What will be its weight with a full load?
How many liters will remain in a 1000-liter storage tank if 8.2% of the liquid has evaporated due to excessive heat?
Dante recently sold some stocks for which he originally bought for ₱358. If it has increased in value by 116%, how much did he receive for the stock?
Mr. Manny Vargas, a real state broker sold a building for ₱175M. How much did he receive if his commission is 5.5% of the sale price of the property?
If 560 out of 700 examinees passed in the recent Career Service Exam for Sub-Professional level, what percent of the examinees passed?
Mr.Cruz borrows ₱750,000 from Asian Bank and is charged ₱90,000 interest. What rate of interest of the examinees passed?
A store sells shirts for  ₱ 1,078 each or 3 for ₱2,997. How much would one save by buying 3 shirts at a time instead of 3 shirts, one at a time?
A computer can be rented for ₱1,745 a week or ₱347.50 a day. You need the computer only for 6 days. At which rate ( daily or weekly ), would it be cheaper to rent and by how much cheaper?

A 1.25 -kg box of Brand A detergent sells for ₱87.50.  A 1.5 - kg box of Brand B detergent sells for ₱103.20.
What is the difference in the price per kg?
A 30-cm long plastic pipe costs ₱249. At this rate, what is the price of the pipe per meter?

A homeowner can rent a chain saw for a rental agency at ₱2,700 a day. The brand new of the same saw can be bought for ₱18,900. For how many days could the homeowner rent the saw before renting would cost more than buying?
Paula uses ten 100-watt bulbs in her house. She uses these bulbs at an average of 5 hours each day. How many KWH do these bulbs use each day?
An electric range uses 12,200 watts per hour and is run an average of 60 hours a year. How many kilowatt-hour is this?
A video casette movie, purchased for ₱440 was marked up 25% on the selling price. Later as the retail prices fell, this movie was marked down 20% on the current sale price. Find its new sale price.

MSA Products InC. , bought these office supplies last week: 1,320 pens @ ₱0.125; 1,480 packs paper clips @ ₱0.625; 1,240 boxes of tape @ ₱0.875; 1,720 boxes of cards @ ₱0.80. A 5% sales tax is addeD.  What was the company's total bill?
The question - "How many flowers are needed to border a rectangular garden?", involves
How many meters of fencing are needed to enclose an 84-meter by 48-meter rectangular garden?
How many 1-cm square stickers are needed to cover a photo box 4 cm long, 3 cm wide and 5 cm high?
One side of a triangle is 3 cm longer than the shortest side, and the other side is 4cm longer than the shortest side. How long is the shortest side if the perimeter is 67 cm?
The length of the rectangle is 2 cm less than twice its width. What is its width in cm, if its perimeter is 50 cm?

sampleQuestion.text: If 3x + 5 = 20, what is the value of x?

name: English - Synonyms
direction: Choose the letter that corresponds to the word closest in meaning to the bold and italicized word in the sentence.

questions.text: We should never be apathetic towards other people for we have a social responsibility to fulfill.
A good leader should be cognizant of the numerous issues that affect his constituents.
Always be careful not to issue any disparaging remarks against other people.
Flowers are ephermal ; they bloom yet whiter in a week or so later.
A fastidious person will never find true happiness.
The Ortigas Center is filled with gargantuan buildings, some having up to 50 floors.
Nobody liked haughty Monty who kept bragging about his riches.
The corrupt policeman was discharged from service due to his ignominous act of accepting bribes.
The impudent child was scolded for answering back to older people.
Spores are infinitesimal reproductive units of fungi and lower plants.
Never trust an insidious person because you'll never know what goes on in his mind.
Jessica is an irascible girl who frequently has tantrums.
Surgeons should be meticulous especially when performing operations
Christ teaches us to be concerned about putting up riches in heaven and not to be obsessed with mundane things.
Rochelle has difficulty seeing things from afar because she is myopic
Regina, being a child of three, is oblivious to the world around her.
Man can never be omniscient like God.
The piquant mouse was able to find its way out of the maze in a short while.
It is now plausible to say that someday, interplanetary travel will no longer be impossible.
A prudent person is not easily deceived.
"Spare the rod and spoil the child" is a common aphorism.
Charmaine's deportment is highly commendable.
For enmity and hate are contrary to friendship and concord.
The Filipino's fortitude is the reason why he seldom complains.
Poverty should never viewed as an impedement towards attaining good education.
The students were upbraided for misbehaving during the assembly.
Urbane people are appalled by rude behavior.
Clowns are never vapid but the sick usually are.
The client was asked to verify the veracity of the statement of accounts issued.

Dentists believe that babies should be weaned from freeding bottles as soon as possible to prevent
malformation of the infant's erupting teeth.
Some people believe that Balete Drive is haunted because a wraith of a woman appears here.
She looks unkempt with her wavy coarse hair falling freely behind her back.
The room is topsy-turvy , as if a hurricane just passed through.
Sherloch Holmes is a famous sleuth.
Mindy rummaged through the chest of old clothes for something usable to donate.
Only a ruffian could do such a heinous act of killing a helpless child.
To augment the policemen's income, the goverment allowed them to take part-time jobs.
A person's reputation is very important so be very careful not to caluminate anybody.
The footprints were effaced when the floor was mopped.
The plane overshot the runway and landed on a ditch.

direction: Choose the letter that corresponds to the word opposite in meaning to the italicized word or phrase in the sentence.

questions.text: Czarmaine accompanied her sister to the drugstore.

The sickly dog was given lethal dose of morphine tablets.
Heinous criminals are truly loathsome.

The free medical and dental checkup conducted by the AFP Group is just a proof of their munifecence.
Justice calls for penalizing nefarious acts.

You will never get sufficient nourishment if you are obdurate in refusing to eat vegetables.

If words were swords, then her vitriolic remarks could really kill.

That yonder youths is more studious than the nearer one.
MSA tutors are all zealous tutors who nourish eager minds.
Don't let trivial things upset you.

name: English - Correct Usage
direction: Choose the letter that corresponds to the word or phrase that will correctly complete each sentence.

questions.text: Czarmaine ____________ remarkable poems even at her young age.
Being too ____________ will undoubtebly make other men hate you.
Due to bad weather, the airline company decided ____________ postpone the flight.
Drunk driving was the reason for ____________ accident.
May I ____________ your Titanic compact disk?
____________ the three girls, the eldest is the most diligent.
Exposure to air pollution will ____________ your asthma.
His ____________ to Mount Apo was carefully documented.
The children ____________ the ill effects of war.
The teachers distributed different ____________ outlines for the students to follow.
Carl juggles oranges, __________ you?
The refugees decided to ____________ their homes because of the war.
My sister ____________ to Zamboanga seven years ago.
We used ____________ sauce for the spaghetti last Sunday.
If we work together, we could finish this __________ in a short time.
When the Apartheid Policy was still in effect, the Black were ____________ by the Whites.
When we ____________ the flag, we should all stand up.
The DPWH crew worked ____________ the night to repair the damaged bridge.
__________ the leader of your group?
The village elder told many interesting ____________.
Marty ________ Evelyn _____ to dinner.
The celebrant ____________ the candles after we sang.
The secretary ____________ due to stress.
The Edsa People's Revolution ____________ the Marcos regime.
The unexpected ____________ of vehicles along Marcos Highway caused heavy traffic.
After cleaning the entire house, I felt ____________.
The drug pushers tried to ____________ the arresting cops.
The Cabinet meeting was ___________ on account of the President's ill health.
The tele-novela viewers cried helplessly when they got ___________ by the tragedy that befell the main character.
We should ___________ on our expenditures and spend only on our needs.
People of all races should try to ___________ with each other.
We should grow wiser as time _______________.
The partying teens were told to ___________ the noise.
A gust of strong wind ___________ the old wooden swing.
A number of factory workers were ___________ due to retrenchment.
We should never ___________ people with disabilities for they also have the right to live.
Stop ___________ your younger brother so he will stop crying.
Always ___________ your best effort in everything you do.
Did you help in ___________ the table.
She ___________ the details of the program.

sampleQuestion.text: Neither the teacher nor the students ____ aware of the announcement.

questions.text: Nauulinigan ang pag-uusap ng grupo dahil sa lakas ng tinig nila.
Karapatan ng bawat batang Pilipino ang magkaroon ng pamilyang mag-aaruga sa kanya.
Nagugulumihan si Rochelle kung anong kurso ang kanyang kukuning sa kolehiyo.
Tigib na ng pasahero ang dyip nang ito ay umalis.
Hindi na nakapagpigil ang kaawa-awang katulong kaya ibinulalas ang sama ng loob sa mapag-aping amo.
Iminungkahi ang pagbabawal magtapon ng basura sa di-wastong lugar.
Madalas silang mapaaway dahil sa kanilang kapalaluan.
Pakiramdam niya ay labis-labis ang kanyang suliranin kung kaya siya ay maligalig.
Maalwan lang ang nararapat na dalahin ng isang bata.
Sa palihan nagagawa ang mga itak, espada at iba pang yari sa bakal.
Hindi mo dapat gawing katuwaan ang pagkutya sa kapwa.
Ang pag-eensayo ng banda ay nakabubulahaw.
Dapat kang magkamal ng salapi sa mabuting paraan.
Ilang taon ding siniil ng mga dayuhan ang mga Pilipino.
Ang anumang alitan ay di dapat hayaang magtagal.
Laganap ang krisis kaya tayo ay dapat magtipid.
Madaling nababalino sa lihis na gawain ang mga kabataang laki sa langsangan.
Maraming himutok ang mga manggagawa laban sa kanilang kumpanya gaya ng di pagtaas ng kanilang sahod.
Walang minimithi ang iyong magulang kungdi ang mabigyan ka ng magandang kinabukasan.
Iwasang sumugba sa alanganin.
Huwag mong pukawin ang batang nahihimlay.
Hindi ka dapat magmaktol kung ika'y napagsasabihan.
Tuwing Marso, ang puno ng mangga ay namumutiktik sa bunga.
Kumipot ang Maynila sa dami ng taong naninirahan dito..
Patang-pata siya nang marating ang tuktok ng bundok Apo.

direction: Piliin ang salitang kasalungat ng salitang nakapahilig.

questions.text: Ang pag-iibigan nina Florante at Laura ay matimyas.
Dinidiligan ng pataba ang halaman upang ito'y yumabong.
Namamasyal siya sa parke upang mapawi ang lumbay.
Hinintay namin ang pagdaong ng Superferry upang salubungin si Ate.
Palasak na ang paggamit ng kompyuter.
Nabaghan siya nang dumating ang kanyang amang dalawang taong naghanap-buhay sa ibang bansa.
Huwag mong ugaliin ang umalipusta ng iyong kapwa.
Pahapay na ang mga maliliit na kumpanya dahil sa pagbagsak ng ekonomiya.
Makapal at magalas ang palad ng mga mason at karpintero.
Masalimuot man ang buhay natin, di tayo dapat mawalan ng pag-asa.
Sinaplutan man lamang sana nila ang sanggol bago ito ginamit sa paglilimos.
Hindi dapat pagkatiwalaan ang mga taong taksil na mabait lamang kung kaharap mo.
Tila walang kapaguran ang mabungalngal na bibig ni Lina.
Napakakupad ng takbo ng karitela kung ikukumpara sa traysikel at dyip.
Patuloy na magdarahop ang taong tamad.
Mahirap pakinggan ang sinasabi ng taong garil.
Kumain ka ng masustansiyang pagkain nang hindi maging hawas.
Ang labis na pagiging hidhid ay nakasasama rin lalo pa't hindi ka marunong magbigay sa nangangailangan.
Hungkag ang bigasan dahil nasira ng bagyo ang mga palay.
Ang mga bulaklak ng orkidya ay naluoy sa tindi ng init.
Totoo bang walang latoy ang pagkain sa ospital.
Hindi linubayan ng mga manunulat ang pagtatanong sa panauhing pandangal.
Ang mga tirahan ng mayayaman ay maagwat sa isa't isa.
Maantak ang sugat kapag napatakan ng kalamansi.
Tunay na mabalasik ang leon at ang tigre.

sampleQuestion.text: Ang desisyon ng hukom ay paborable sa nasasakdal.

name: Filipino - Mga Kawikaan
direction: Piliin ang salitang kasing-kahulugan ng salitang nakapahilig.

questions.text: Nag-alsa balutan ang katulong sa bahay dahil sa kalupitan ng kanyang amo.
Hindi totoo ang kanyang katapangan sapagkat bahag ang buntot niya sa harap ng paghihirap.
Dahil sa paulit-ulit na pagsisinungaling, basa ang papel niya sa karamihan.
Kumukulo ang dugo ng ina ni Robin sa kanya sapagkat hindi siya nag-aral.
Di-mahapayang gatang ang pagpapalitan ng kuro-kuro ng mga mambabatas.
Noong panahon ng pananakop ng Kastila, ang mga Pilipino ay hawak sa tainga ng mga ito.
Mabulaklak ang landas ng taong masikap.
Maliit ang sisidlan ni Mhon kaya iniiwasan siyang biruin.
Mahilig kasing magbasa kahit sa madilim si Tina kaya siya ay nagmamatang-manok.
Kung minsan, inggit ang nagiging dahilan sa pagsasaulian ng kandila.
Pabalat-bunga lang pala ang pagiging bukas-palad niya; may pulitikal pala itong kadahilanan kaya siya mapagbigay.
Tiklop-tuhod ang akusado na siya ay patawarin ng biktima.
Ni ayaw man lamang humarap sa tao ang talo-saling na si Eula.
Di dapat tularan ang mga taong walang kusang-palo.
Hindi tama ang ika'y walang lingon-likod. Dapat ay suklian ang kabutihan ng iba sa iyo.
Makapigil-hininga ang pelikulang Muro Ami.
Halang ang kaluluwa ng taong gumagawa ng karumal-dumal na krimen.
Di-maliparan ng uwak ang lupain ng mga Aquino sa Tarlac.
Makunat pa sa patola si Lola Rosa kaya uugud-ugod na.
Nilubugan ng araw ang mga taong nasalanta ng bagyo ang mga tirahan.
Hindi mo matatagpuan sa kanilang bahay si Cecile palibhasa ay may puyo sa talampakan.
Binata na si JB kaya siya ay naniningalang-pugad na.
Malimit na may kabanggaan si Malou sa opisina dahil maanghang ang kanyang dila.
Di napaunlakan ni Ana ang imbitasyong manood sila ng sine sapagkat butas ang kanyang bulsa.
Si Karl ay nagtataingang-kawali. Animo'y wala siyang naririnig kahit tinatawag na.

name: Filipino - Wastong Gamit
direction: Piliin ang titik ng salitang angkop sa patlang.

questions.text: Katungkulan _______ sinuman ang tumulong sa kanyang kapwA.
____________ ko kay Inay ang mga kaganapan sa aming paaralan sa isang buong papel.
Ang ____________ ng mga manlalaro ay dininig ng komite kahapon.
Nagulat ang mga tao _________ mabalitaan ang kaguluhan nagaganap sa Mindanao.
___________ mo si Chin ng damit sa kabinet.
____________ suliranin ng pagtataas ng presyo ng gasolina ang pinapaksa ng pulong sa kasalukuyan.
Ang paglalakbay ___________ Magellan noong 1521 ang naging dahilan kung bakit nakilala ang Pilipinas sa ibang bansa.
Ang pagkakalat o pagtatapon sa kung saan-saan ay ___________ batas.
Pinatay _________ mga Hapones si Jose Abad Santos nang tinanggihan niyang ibunyag ang lihim ng mga kilusang Pilipino laban sa kanila.
____________ mo naman sa kanila na magdala ng mapagsaluhan.
____________ G. at Gng. Reyes, matagal na nilang pinag-iipunan ang pangtustos sa pag-aaral mo sa kolehiyo.
____________ ni Emilio Jacinto ang Kartilya na naglalaman ng adhikain ng Katipunan.
Dumating ang Lola _________ kami'y nagdiwang.
Ang pagbabara ng mga estero ay dulot ________ walang pakundangang pagtatapon ng basura.
____________ maari ay magtipid tayo nang husto.
Mapadadali ang ating gawain _________ tayo ay magtutulung-tulungan.
Masaya sila ____________ napakaraming pagsubok ang dumarating sa kanilang pamilya.
____________ pagod na pagod na sa biyahe ni Rey ay nagawa pa rin niya ang mag-aral.
Patuloy tayong maghahalinhinan sa pagroronda ____________ di pa nahuhuli ang magnanakaw.
Nagtatalon sa tuwa si Regina ____________ mapanalunan ang patimpalak sa pagsusulat ng maikling kuwento.
Hindi maaring ibilanggo ang sino man dahil ________ kanyang pagkakautang.
Nagpapatugtog sila _________ awiting Pilipino.
Ang ____________ ng mga mamamayan ng huwag munang magtaas ng presyo ng langis ay pinag-aralan ng kinauukulan.
Hindi _______ nabibigyang lunas ang sakit na AIDS sa ngayon.
____________ bang suliranin na hindi kayang lutasin.
____________ patimpalak sa Balagtasan na gaganapin sa plasa.
____________ ba nagkaroon ng isang bulkan.
____________ natin ang ating kapwang nangangailan ng tulong.
Huwag mong ____________ ang sino man nasa kapangyarihan kung nais mo laman makakuha ng pabor.
____________ mo ang mabibigat na dalahin ng Inay.

sampleQuestion.text: Mahigpit na ________ ng pamunuan ang pagsusuot ng ID sa loob ng paaralan simula bukas.

name: Filipino - Pagkilala sa Mali
direction: Basahing mabuti ang bawat pangungusap. Hanapin ang salita o grupo ng mga salitang may salangguhit na di wasto ang gamit. Kung walang mali, piliin ang titik e.

name: Constitution
direction: Choose letter that corresponds to the answer that will make each statement correct.

questions.text: What do you call the introductory part of the Constitution?
What form of goverment does the Philippine adopt?
What is the power of the State to take private property for public use upon payment of a just compensation?
Who among the following may issue a warrant of arrest or a search warrant?
A foreigner may acquire Filipino citizenship through
The right to vote is also known as ____________.
How many Senators are there in the Senate?
What is the minimum age requirement of a Senator?
Which of the following bills do not originate from the House of Representative?
The members of the Lower House are
options: elected by region and by party list.
elected by region and appointed by the President.
elected by district and party list.
elected by district and appointed by the Senators.
questions.answer: elected by district and party list.

questions.text: The legislative power of the government shall be vested in the
Which of the following may disqualify a person from running for Presidency?
options: He is sixty years old on the day of the election.
He lived abroad five years preceding the election.
He has Filipino parents but was born in the United States.
questions.answer: He lived abroad five years preceding the election.

questions.text: Which of the following shows the transfer of power should the President be incapable of dischargin his duties.
options: President → Vice President → Senate President → House Speaker
President → Vice President → Chief Justice → Senate President
President → Vice President → Chief Justice → House Speaker
President → Vice President → House Speaker → Senate President
questions.answer: President → Vice President → Senate President → House Speaker

questions.text: A member of the Supreme Court
options: must have been for fifteen years or more, a judge of a lower court.
must have been for ten years, a judge of the Court of Appeals.
may not be a member of the Philippine Bar.
questions.answer: must have been for fifteen years or more, a judge of a lower court.

questions.text: The Supreme Court is composed of
options: a Chief Justice and fourteen Associate Justices.
two Chief Justice and fourteen Associate Justices.
a chief Justice and twelve Associate Justices.
a chief Justice and an indefinite number of Associate Justices.
questions.answer: a Chief Justice and fourteen Associate Justices.

questions.text: Which of the following is a Constitutional Commission?
What branch of goverment has the sole right to initiate all cases of impeachment?
Which of the following is not removable from office by impeachment?
The national language of the Philippines is
Who may propose any amendment to, or revision of the Constitution?
What tax is paid by individuals who derive compensation income?
When is the deadline for filing income tax returns for every taxable year?
Which of the following statements is true about taxes.
options: It is payable both in cash and in kinD.
It is based on one's desire to pay.

questions.text: What tax is imposed on one's right to transmit property at death, and is measured by the value of the property?
Which of the following is classified as being a "Head of the Family" for income tax purposes?
What Act implements the mandate for the "State to make essential goods, health and other social services available to all the people at affordable cost?".
Which of the following is true about elective local officials?
options: The term of office is three years.
Barangay officials' term of office is indefinite.
An official may be reelected indefinitely.
An official may not serve for less than three terms.
questions.answer: The term of office is three years.

questions.text: What may be classified as alienable land of the public domain?
What is the maximum equity for aliens in a corporation or association in the exploration development and utilization of natural resources?
What is recognized by the State as the foundation of the nation?

sampleQuestion.text: Who is the Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces?

name: Data Sufficiency
direction:
Each of this data sufficiency problem consists of a question and two statements, labeled (1) and (2), in which certain data are given. You have to decide whether the data given in the statements are sufficient for the answering the questions. Choose the letter
a. if statement (1) ALONE is sufficient, but statement (2) alone is not sufficent.
b. if statement (2) ALONE is sufficient, but statement (1) alone is not sufficent.
c. if BOTH statements TOGETHER are sufficient, but NEITHER statement alone is sufficent.
d. if each statement ALONE is sufficent.
e. if statements (1) and (2) TOGETHER are not sufficent.

questions.text:
By what percent was the price per kilo of chicken increased?
(1) The price per kilo of chicken was increased by ₱20.
(2) The price per kilo of chicken after the increase was ₱120.

A real estate broker received a commission of 8% of the selling price of a certain property, what was the selling price of the property?
(1) The selling price minus the real estate agent's commission was ₱9,200,000.
(2) The selling price was 250% of the original purchase price of ₱4,000,000.

Chin-Chin and Quennie May were among those who sold raffle tickets to raise money for the cluB. If Chin-Chin and Queenie May sold a total of 168 tickets, how many tickets did Chin-Chin sell?
(1) Queenie May sold 60% as many raffle tickets as Chin-Chin.
(2) Queenie May sold 8% of all the raffle tickets sold.

What is the ratio of m : s : a ?
(1) a = 2, and ms = 64
(2) ms = 2 and as = 14

If x and y are integers, is x divisible by 17?
(1) The product xy is divisible by 17.
(2) y is not divisible by 17.

On Saturday morning the printing machine of Gerpress Printing ran continously at uniform rate to fill a production order. At what time did it completely fill the order that morning?
(1) The supervisor began the plan for production 8:08 a. m.
(2) The machine had filled 50% of the order at 9:48 a. m. and 56 of the order by 10:18 a. m.

How many books does Gerard have?
(1) If Gerard had 18 fewer books, he would have only half as many as he actually has.
(2) Gerard has three times as many fiction as non-fiction books.

What number is 24% of x ?
(1) 16 is 8% of x
(2) 18 of x is 1600.

What was the total amount raised for the Payatas Tragedy from private corporations and personal donations?
(1) Of the amount donated, 48% came from the private corporations
(2) Of the amount donated, ₱15M came from personal donations.

Miriam's total score in the three bowling games was 530. What were her scores?
(1) Miriam's highes score was 198.
(2) The sum of Miriam's two highest score was 368.

Is the value of n closer to 48 than to 78?
(1) 78 - n > n - 48
(2) n > 60

In last Saturday's Midnight Sale at StA. Lucia Mall a certain shop sold 75% of the shirts in its inventory. Each shirt was sold for ₱358. What was the total revenue from the sale of these shirts on that day?
(1) When the shop opened last Saturday, there were 448 shirts in its inventory.
(2) All but 112 of the shop's inventory were sold last Saturday.

How many more boys than girls are there in the room?
(1) There is a total of 56 girls and boys in the room.
(2) The number of boys in the room equals the square of the number of girls in the room.

In what year was Gerard born?
(1) Gerards's friend Mary Angela, who is 12 years younger than him, was born in 1979.
(2) In 1998 Gerard turned 20 years olD.

A box contains 48 balls, of which 30 are red and 18 are blue. If 16 of the balls are removed, how many of the balls left in the box are blue?
(1) Of the balls removed, the ratio of the number of red ones to the number of blue one is 5:3.
(2) Of the first 8 marbles removed, 5 are reD.

How long did it take Mrs, Alferez to drive non-stop on a trip from her home to Ayala Alabang?
(1) If Mrs. Alferez's average speed for the trip had been 1.5 times as fast, the trip would have taken 2 hours.
(2) Mrs. Alferez's average speed for the trip was 80 km per hour.

If Myrna had a dentist's appointment on a certain day, was the appointment on a Friday?
(1) Exactly 64 hours before the appointment, it was Wednesday
(2) The appointment is between 2:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m.

What was the average number of kilometers per liter of gasoline a car can consume during a certain trip?
(1) The total cost of the gasoline used by the car or the 640-km trip was ₱1,152
(2) The cost for the gasoline used by the car for the trip was ₱18.00 per liter

What is the ratio of a to b?
(1) a is 8 more than twice b.
(2) The ratio of a to 4b is 3:7.

At MSA Tutorial and Review Center, 400 students are enrolled for the Review Program or Academic Advancement Program or both. If 100 of these students are not enrolled in the Review Program, how many of them are enrolled in both MSA Review Program and MSA Academic Advancement Program?
(1) Of the 400 students, 160 are not enrolled in the Academic Advancement Program.
(2) A total of 240 of the students are enrolled in the Academic Advancement Program.

sampleQuestion.text:
What is the area of the rectangular garden?
(1) The perimeter of the garden is 40 meters.
(2) The length of the garden is twice its width.
